clinic.title: 關於我們的診所

values.title: 富有同情心的護理
values.description: 我們以尊重、同情和對其福祉的真誠關懷對待每位患者。

values.title: 臨床卓越
values.description: 我們保持最高的實踐標準，使用優質草藥和無菌技術。

values.title: 以患者為中心
values.description: 您的需求、關切和目標是我們所做一切的核心。

values.title: 自然癒合
values.description: 我們相信支持身體自我癒合的自然能力。

description: Smith 醫生診所成立於2010年，使命簡單：為米德爾敦（New York）社區提供便捷、高品質的傳統中醫護理。
從一個小診所開始，已經發展成為一個值得信賴的健康中心，幫助1,000多名患者自然實現更好的健康。
clinic.environment: 我們的診所提供寧靜、溫馨的環境，旨在促進放鬆和癒合。從您進入的那一刻起，您就會感受到不同——寧靜的色彩、舒適的治療室和溫暖、友好的氛圍讓患者感到輕鬆自在。

journey.story:
Gang Shi Acupuncture was founded in 1994 with a simple yet profound mission: to bring the ancient wisdom of Traditional Chinese Medicine to the Great Neck community. What began as a small practice has grown into a trusted healing sanctuary where East meets West, offering hope and restoration to countless individuals seeking natural alternatives to their health challenges.

For thirty years, our clinic has remained rooted in the timeless principles of TCM while adapting to serve the diverse needs of Long Island families. We've witnessed remarkable transformations—from chronic pain sufferers finding relief through acupuncture to anxious patients discovering inner peace through our holistic approach. Each success story strengthens our commitment to preserving these ancient healing arts.

Today, Gang Shi Acupuncture stands as a beacon of authentic traditional medicine in Great Neck, where every patient receives personalized care that honors both their unique constitution and the profound healing wisdom passed down through generations of Chinese medicine masters.
journey.title: 我的中醫之路

profile.bio:
Dr. Gang Shi's journey into Traditional Chinese Medicine began over three decades ago, driven by a deep reverence for the profound healing wisdom of his ancestors. After earning his Master of Science in Traditional Chinese Medicine from the American College of Traditional Chinese Medicine in San Francisco, he became board-certified by the National Certification Commission for Acupuncture and Oriental Medicine (NCCAOM), establishing himself as a trusted practitioner in the field.

With 32 years of clinical experience, Dr. Shi has developed particular expertise in treating complex conditions including chronic pain management, anxiety and panic disorders, women's health issues, respiratory conditions, and immune system imbalances. His approach seamlessly weaves together multiple modalities—acupuncture, Chinese herbal medicine, cupping, moxibustion, and Tuina massage—creating individualized treatment protocols that address not just symptoms, but the root energetic imbalances within each patient.

Dr. Shi believes that true healing occurs when we work in harmony with the body's innate wisdom rather than against it. Fluent in both English and Chinese, he serves as a bridge between ancient Eastern healing traditions and modern wellness needs, guiding each patient toward optimal health through the gentle yet powerful principles of qi cultivation, meridian balance, and constitutional harmony.
profile.name: Dr. Gang Shi
profile.quote: The body holds infinite wisdom to heal itself when we simply provide the right conditions for balance to flourish.
profile.title: L.Ac., NCCAOM

philosophy.title: 治療理念

principles.title: 治療整個人
principles.description: 中醫認識到身體症狀通常與情緒、精神和心靈因素相關。黃醫生解決健康的所有方面，而不僅僅是孤立的症狀。

principles.title: 找到根本原因
principles.description: 治療不僅僅是抑制症狀，而是專注於識別和解決造成疾病的潛在失衡。這種方法帶來持久的結果。

principles.title: 個性化護理
principles.description: 沒有兩個患者是相同的。每個治療計劃都是根據您獨特的體質、健康史和當前狀況精心定制的。

principles.title: 患者教育
principles.description: 了解您的身體和狀況使您能夠在治療中發揮積極作用。黃醫生花時間用清晰、易懂的術語解釋您的診斷和治療。

principles.title: 與西醫結合
principles.description: 中醫可以與傳統醫療護理完美配合。黃醫生與其他醫療保健提供者合作，確保全面、協調的治療。

principles.title: 預防和保健
principles.description: 最好的醫學是在疾病發生前預防它。治療包括飲食、生活方式和自我保健實踐的指導，以保持長期健康。

philosophy.introduction: 黃醫生的治療方法植根於傳統中醫的基本原則，同時融合現代臨床理解。

affiliations.title: 專業會員資格和附屬機構

specializations.title: 專業領域
specializations.description: 通過多年的臨床實踐和繼續教育，黃醫生在幾個關鍵領域發展了特殊的專業知識：

items: 高級運動醫學針灸認證（2019年）
生育和生殖健康專業化（2016年）
與 Heiner Fruehauf 博士的經典中藥研討會
每年參加國家中醫會議
與當地中醫執業者的定期學習小組
每年 30+ 小時的繼續教育（要求：每 3 年 30 小時）
continuingEducation.title: 繼續教育和培訓
continuingEducation.description: 黃醫生積極參與中醫社區，並定期尋求高級培訓：
